app.title: Solod – A subset of Go that translates to C
app.author: TheWiggles
app.description: Subset of Go that translates to C
proposed_tests: Install Solod and run a simple program with the provided tooling
Evaluate the performance of Solod on a set of standard benchmarks
Conduct thorough testing to verify correct translation to C
